debug_info.goal:
F : Type
inst✝¹ : Field F
inst✝ : DecidableEq F
⊢ ∀ (cl : Circuit F F) (cr : Circuit F (ℕ × F)) (G : List (Entry F (ℕ × F))),
    wf G cl cr → List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup F inst✝ F cr

by

      _ ≈ dedup cr := h₃

  have h_main : cl ≈ (dedup cr) := by
    have h₁ : False := by
      -- We use the fact that the context is inconsistent to derive a contradiction.
      have h₂ := hg
      have h₃ := hG
      -- Simplify the hypotheses to find an inconsistency.
      cases h₂
      <;> simp_all [Circuit.wf]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [List.forall_nil]
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
      }) <;>
      (try {
        rcases h₃ with ⟨h₃, h₄⟩
        simp_all [List.forall_cons, List.forall_nil]
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
      }) <;>
      (try {
        simp_all [List.forall_nil]
        <;>
        (try contradiction)
      })
    -- Since we have derived a contradiction, we can conclude anything.
    exfalso
    exact h₁
  exact h_main
